prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热 推荐；安徽省2026年物理类考生约31.3万人（估算），较2025年减少约0.8万人，考生总数下降缓解部分竞争压力；湖南大学位 于湖南省长沙市，属跨省报考；该校在安徽招生规模较大（近年120–146人），对安徽考生有持续吸引力。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5888 → 6447 → 7990 → 9460 → 8426, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2538 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 8426, an increase of about 1034 places compared to 2024, indicating a recovery in application popularity; the enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for Physics Category was 125 in 2021, 131 in 2022, 127 in 2023, 136 in 2024, and 146 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 126, a reduction of 20 students (-13.7%) compared to 2025, which intensifies competition and tends to push rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 31st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable upward trend in recent years (from 32nd in 2021 to 31st in 2026), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; no negative reputation events during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle; ranked 16th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising social attention, which helps attract high-scoring students; has 8 A- or above disciplines including Chemistry (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Business Administration (A), Civil Engineering (A-), Applied Economics (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Electrical Engineering (A-), and Computer Science and Technology (A-), with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines, highly aligned with current popular majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other majors continue to be highly popular and recommended; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Anhui Province for 2026 is about 313,000, a decrease of about 8,000 compared to 2025, with the decline in total candidates alleviating some competitive pressure; Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, which is a cross-province application; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Anhui (120–146 in recent years), maintaining sustained appeal to Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the recovery trend of rankings in 2025, intensified competition due to enrollment reduction in 2026, positive university reputation and Douyin popularity, and high alignment between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 7784, with a range of 7284–8284.

If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<7284), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology (Intelligent Experimental Class) and Electrical Engineering and Automation; if your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>8284), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
